rationale: Academia needs authority, clarity, and objective truth. The UI avoids the typical 'SaaS template' look to embrace a Brutalist, editorial feel that honors scholarly publishing and peer review.

headings.description: Bold, authoritative sans-serif for high impact.
headings.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-bold
headings.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-bold

body.description: Legible, clean, technical sans for reading long academic papers and data tables.

public_pages.alignment: Asymmetrical layout. Heavy use of negative space to direct focus.

dashboard.alignment: Strict grid hierarchy. All available pixels utilized. Left sidebar navigation for better vertical scaling.

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat background (#FFFFFF), sharp or minimal rounded corners (rounded-sm or max 8px), 1px solid border (border-gray-200). NO default shadows. On hover: subtle shadow (shadow-sm) and slight lift (-translate-y-0.5).
surface_strategies.dashboard_header: Solid white background with a hard bottom border.

components.rules: Use Shadcn UI extensively for the dashboard logic, but heavily customize it to match the Swiss Brutalist aesthetic (remove soft shadows, keep borders sharp).
components.buttons: Square or slightly rounded edges. Primary button uses #002FA7 background, high contrast white text. Hover state must lighten slightly, explicitly defining text color (hover:bg-blue-800 hover:text-white).
components.tables: Crucial for Paper Submissions list. Must use sticky header, row hover effects (bg-gray-50), and clear status badges (Accept/Reject/Under Review).
components.tabs: Used heavily in Author Dashboard (Submit, Status, Revisions). Remove pill-style, use stark underline style (border-b-2 border-transparent, active state border-[#002FA7]).
components.dialogs: Used for Reviewer scoring and Editor decision submission. Must have overlay bg-black/50, solid white surface, sharp edges.
components.forms: Inputs must have clear borders, focus ring in primary blue. Use Shadcn's Form, Input, and Select.

navigation.public: Sticky top bar, Logo on left, Links (Journals, About, Language EN/ID), Primary CTA (Login/Register) on right.
navigation.dashboard: Collapsible left sidebar for efficient use of horizontal space for data tables. Clear indicators for Author, Editor, Reviewer, Admin roles.

motion.general: Minimalist. Use for feedback, not decoration.
motion.hover: Explicit hover states on all interactive elements (buttons, links, table rows).
motion.transitions: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease

icons.style: Clean, line-based icons for academic dashboard to maintain the functional aesthetic.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards. Focus states must have higher contrast.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='submit-paper-button', data-testid='login-submit-button'). Convention is kebab-case, role-based.

media.instructions: Use ONLY these URLs. Do not use generic placeholders. Main agent must map these to components.

assets.description: Minimalist architectural shot of academic library. Use as main hero background on public landing page.
Abstract floating paper data blocks. Use for the 'About' section or 'Publishing Process' background.
Modern library interior. Use as contextual image for the 'Journals Archive' or 'Publications' listing page.
Researcher reading a paper. Use in the 'Join as a Reviewer' CTA section.
